>
  <svg
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    stroke="currentColor"
    fill="none"
    class="w-8 h-8 mr-4 -ml-2 text-white animate-pulse"
  >
    <path
      d="M12 4v16m8-8H4"
      stroke-width="2"
      stroke-linejoin="round"
      stroke-linecap="round"
    ></path>
  </svg>
  Hover Me
</button>
